summary: This is a brief holiday greeting post where Joel Spolsky wishes his readers a Happy Thanksgiving. There is no substantive argument or technical content. It reflects the personal, informal nature of blogging in the early 2000s, where bloggers would post short updates to maintain a connection with their audience.
key_points: A simple two-word holiday greeting with no technical or analytical content
key_insight: Even influential technical bloggers occasionally posted brief personal greetings to maintain reader connection.
